snippet: Principals are required to ensure that arrangements have been made for the maximum number of students (particularly students of compulsory school age) to attend school during any industrial action. The dismissal of students should only be considered where: When there has been no opportunity to inform parents, students are not to be dismissed from school or left unsupervised in classrooms or the school grounds. Duty of care Duty of care for Industrial Action — Teaching Service Industrial action Industrial Action — Teaching Service action Student dismissal for Industrial Action — Teaching Service Reviewed 02 April 2020
